LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-19-2023 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL MUST SUPPLY A COPY OF THE CORRECT VERSION OF THE PROPOSED CONSENT JUDGMENT FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/CK)

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar May-19-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion is granted. Counsel must supply a copy of the correct version of the proposed consent judgment for the court's signature.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/CK)
